- : app = { "type": symbol("normal"), "value": symbol("null"),
            "__completion__": true, "target": symbol("empty"),  }

> exec((("cat /sys/class/net/" + iface) + "/address"), function(err, out) {
  if (err) {
    callback(err, null);
    return ;
  }
  callback(null, out["trim"]()["toLowerCase"]());
});
